posts.author: mcm (mcm)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello, its a straight forward request. i would like to be able to filter on the workspaces on the query itself, so i dont have to data dump my users, or make a filtering function in memory, and only show the workspaces the user actually needs

What are you trying to achieve

Limit data dumping on applications using the API, and make it simpler to work with accounts who has lots of workspaceses
